case_title: VANUCE PEDREIRO VS. THE REALREAL, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY PEDREIRO, VANUCE AS TO DEFENDANT THE REALREAL, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-17-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REMARK:RECEIVED EXHIBITS VIA MAIL FROM PLAINTIFF(VANUCE PEDREIRO)
SC-109(AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR) JULIET WREN-JARVIS. FILED BY DEFENDANT THE REALREAL, INC.
ORDER TO DISMISS CASE WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
ORDER RE:REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM PLAINTIFF(VANUCE PEDREIRO)GRANTED**
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEDREIRO, VANUCE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-17-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-02-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF VANUCE PEDREIRO IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT THE REALREAL, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JULIET WREN-JARVIS (SENIOR LEGAL ASSISTANT). NO PROOF OF SERVICE. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT WHERE DEFENDANT PAYS PLAINTIFF $5,000 (INCLUDES COST) WITHIN AT LEAST 30 DAYS OF SIGNED SETTLEMENT AND MUTUAL RELEASE AGREEMENT. CASE SET FOR PROGRESS REPORT ON MAY 02, 2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT 506. DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE IF NO APPEARANCES. IF APPEARANCES, JUDGMENT WILL BE ISSUED. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
DECLARATION RE:REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEDREIRO, VANUCE
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER.(SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PEDREIRO, VANUCE THE REALREAL, INC.
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
